name: Turbo Pulse Race
short_description: In the game, when you drift, you increase your level with the points you earn and unlock cars accordingly. With fast and fluid gameplay, your mistakes might not leave cars behind you.
detailed_description: You can enjoy a driving experience with pleasure in the roads you have selected on the map. You earn points when drifting, which allow you to unlock new cars. Each car has different maximum speed, acceleration, and handling values. You can play with your favorite car as much as you want. There are many cars available, which unlock and become accessible according to your level. You can also select the maps as you wish.
